headline: Coinbase’s Trust Bank Approval Puts Trading Versus Custody Future In Focus
summary: Coinbase Global (NasdaqGS:COIN) has received conditional approval from the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency to establish a national trust bank. The conditional charter would allow Coinbase to provide trust and custody services at a federal level, subject to meeting final regulatory requirements. This development expands Coinbase's path to operate under a national banking framework rather than a patchwork of state licenses. Coinbase is best known as a large US based crypto trading...

headline: Coinbase Stock Scores Weekly Win Even As War-Truce Hopes Dim; Is Coinbase Stock A Buy Now?
summary: Coinbase stock scores a 6% weekly gain even as hopes of an imminent truce in the U.S.-Iran war dim while crypto legislation stalls.

headline: ARKK Let’s You Bet Big on Crypto Infrastructure With Top Disruptors In 2026
